caption: A man with a short beard, wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with gold "BOSS TALK" text, and a gold watch, sits in a studio setting. He wears headphones and sits behind a desk equipped with a professional microphone and a black mug featuring the text "BOSS TALK OUT LOUD". Behind him is a white wall with repeated gold star logos and the text "UNIQUE HUSTLE", and a blue sign that reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". A small logo with a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK" is visible in the bottom left corner of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man remains seated, looking toward someone off-screen to his right. He slightly shifts his facial expression and head position while speaking, with his right arm resting on the table and his left arm slightly extended.
